summary: Frontend-only retest. All five previous regressions are fixed: (1) signup.tsx imports useT and creates `const t = useT()`, screen renders cleanly and successfully created Firebase user testuser+pv@example.com / TestPass123! via the UI (login first returned auth/invalid-credential because account didn't exist; signup then succeeded and routed to /(tabs)/dashboard). (2) dashboard.tsx imports useI18n, FILTERS_BASE → FILTERS via useMemo with localized labels, all hardcoded PT strings replaced with t.dashboard.* (greeting, totalLabel, cardsSaved, conditionAnalysis, collection, searchPlaceholder, filterRecent, filterValue, emptyTitle/Sub). (3) New 🇵🇹/🇬🇧 flag pressable [data-testid=locale-toggle] now lives in dashboard header next to logout and successfully flips entire app PT⇄EN; toggle state persists across reload (localStorage 'pv.locale'). (4) scan.tsx mounts without error, styles.frameOutline now defined (thin neon outline visible inside the corner brackets). (5) condition.tsx fully translates in PT — Ajustar Centragem / Cantos / Arestas / Superfície, all subtitles, Cantos Brancos + Riscos na Superfície, ESTADO + VALOR MANTIDO, Calcular valor button, CARTA DETECTADA banner. (6) card-detail.tsx hero shows [data-testid=detail-share] button; tapping on web preview gracefully renders inline banner 'Sharing unavailable on this device.' (EN) / 'Partilha indisponível neste dispositivo.' (PT) — no crash. POOR/MINT labels under retention bar correctly remain literal in both locales by design. Minor non-blocking: tab labels 'Scan' and 'Upgrade' aren't translated (only 'Portfolio'→'Portfólio' flips); previously-known deprecated style warnings (shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents) still present.

issues: Tab labels for Scan and Upgrade do not translate when locale flips to PT (only Portfolio→Portfólio works). Likely t.tabs.scan / t.tabs.upgrade are either identical to EN in the dictionary or not wired into the tabBarLabel. Cosmetic, not blocking the retest.

react_native_issues.issue: Web preview console still warns 'shadow*' and 'textShadow*' style props are deprecated (use 'boxShadow' / 'textShadow') and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking, but worth migrating for RN 0.76+. References: total value glow + card row shadows + scan laser shadow.

action_items: Optional: translate (tabs)/_layout.tsx tabBarLabel for Scan & Upgrade tabs via t.tabs.* (only Portfolio currently flips).
Optional cleanup: migrate shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents to the new RN web-supported props to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.tsx: FILTERS useMemo is dependency-correct (recomputes when t.dashboard.filterRecent / filterValue change).
card-detail.tsx: graceful Platform.OS web fallback for share is correctly gated and shows a localized banner — good UX.
share-card.tsx: dictionaries[locale] direct reads ensure the captured share image respects the active locale at snapshot time.
i18n-context.tsx: detectDeviceLocale() correctly defaults non-EN tags (incl. pt-BR/pt-PT, es, fr) to 'pt' per product spec, with saved override via storage.
seed_data_creation: Firebase user testuser+pv@example.com / TestPass123! was created via the signup screen during this run. No backend seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All five regressions from iteration_1 are fixed and verified end-to-end on web preview at https://card-scanner-pro-8.preview.emergentagent.com. The test Firebase account now exists; future runs should hit the login flow directly. Locale toggle persists across reload — verified by reloading dashboard after switching to PT and reading body text. Only outstanding cosmetic items: tab labels for Scan/Upgrade not translated and deprecated RN web style prop warnings.
rca_of_issue: All previously reported ReferenceErrors and missing-style bugs were caused by an incomplete i18n second-pass refactor on signup.tsx and dashboard.tsx (imports/symbols not wired, FILTERS rename half-applied, hardcoded PT strings left in place) plus a missing StyleSheet key in scan.tsx. Main agent's fixes in this iteration add the missing imports/hooks, compute a localized FILTERS array from FILTERS_BASE inside the component, render a 🇵🇹/🇬🇧 toggle pressable, replace PT literals with t.dashboard.* keys, and define styles.frameOutline. Confirmed working via Playwright signup→dashboard→toggle→reload→condition→card-detail flow.
